front.title: Session Initiation Protocol (SIP) User Agent Capability Extension to Presence Information Data Format (PIDF)
front.workgroup: SIP for Instant Messaging and Presence Leveraging Extensions

abstract.t: Presence Information Data Format (PIDF) defines a common presence data format for Common Profile for Presence (CPP) compliant presence protocols. This memo defines a PIDF extension to represent SIP User Agent capabilities. [STANDARDS-TRACK]
